name: Sesame Chicken 4
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Cut chicken into pieces about 1 by 2 inches.
3. Mix soy sauce, maple syrup, sherry, ginger, and Chinese five spice together in a bowl. Add chicken and marinate for 20 minutes, turning once.
4. Meanwhile, place sesame seeds on a baking tray and toast in the oven for 10 minutes or until slightly browned.
5. Drain chicken, reserving the marinade.
6. Dredge chicken in flour seasoned with a little salt and pepper. Shake off any excess.
7. Heat oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat. Add chicken and brown on all sides, about 1 minute per side. Spoon some of the reserved marinade over the chicken.
8. Reduce heat to low and sauté another minute or until the chicken is cooked through.
9. Remove from heat and roll the chicken in toasted sesame seeds.
10. Wash and dry lettuce leaves. Line a serving plate with the leaves. Place the chicken on top and garnish with tomato wedges.
